scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter '!./artifacts/mockup-sandbox' --if-present run build
scripts.build:railway: pnpm install && pnpm run build && cd lib/db && npx drizzle-kit push --force
scripts.start: cd lib/db && npx drizzle-kit push --force && cd ../.. && NODE_ENV=production node artifacts/api-server/dist/index.cjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
